news.summary: On Tuesday, May 6, 2025, from 11:00 to 12:00 am CEST, Coloplast is organizing a conference call following the release of its interim financial results for the first half of 2024/25 at around 07:30 am CEST on the same day. The purpose is to present the financial outcomes and address inquiries from investors and financial analysts. A presentation will be uploaded on Coloplast’s website roughly an hour prior to the call. The webcast for the conference will be accessible both during and after the session, offering a detailed insight into the financial performance of the company.
news.headline: Coloplast A/S will host a conference call on 6 May 2025 at 11.00am CEST to discuss their H1 2024/25 earnings, released that day at 07.30am CEST. Presentation available on website. Webcast available during and after the event.

news.summary: Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG) announced the sale of its North America dry corn and corn masa milling businesses to Grain Craft, a major U.S. flour miller. The deal includes Bunge facilities in seven locations: Danville, Illinois; Worthington, Indiana; Crete, Nebraska; Red Oak, Iowa; Muleshoe, Texas; Atchison, Kansas; and Queretaro, Mexico. Bunge's Co-President, Agribusiness, Julio Garros stated, “We carefully considered” the transaction.
news.headline: Bunge sells North America corn milling business to Grain Craft. Includes 7 facilities in US & Mexico. Garros commends move.

news.summary: In San Francisco today, InfluxData unveiled InfluxDB 3 Core and InfluxDB 3 Enterprise, the newest additions to its InfluxDB 3 engine lineup. These products are now widely accessible and offer a high-performance, easily expandable database solution for handling time series data. InfluxDB 3 Core is an open-source recent-data engine tailored for real-time applications. Designed to facilitate rapid development and support large-scale production needs, these new offerings cater to the demand for efficient time series data management.
news.headline: InfluxData releases InfluxDB 3 Core & Enterprise, for time series data management. Core is open source for real-time apps.

news.summary: Enterra Solutions has introduced a new product in response to heightened market instability due to reciprocal tariffs and the global trade war. The Enterra Dynamic Enterprise Resiliency System™ (‘EDERS™’) aims to help businesses cope with this uncertainty. The system is created by Enterra Solutions, a leading complexity sciences company based in Princeton, N.J. and Cambridge, Mass. This innovative product is designed to assist enterprises in adapting to challenging market conditions.
news.headline: Enterra Solutions launches EDERS™ to help enterprises amid turbulent markets. The product aims to convert chaos into an advantage.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Moveworks, a top agentic AI Assistant for enterprises, revealed a significant alliance with Stack Overflow today at Moveworks.global. This partnership introduces an integration that will make a downloadable Stack Overflow agent available on Moveworks' AI Agent Marketplace. This collaboration aims to provide mutual customers with easy access to the extensive knowledge base of Stack Overflow through the Moveworks AI Assistant. This collaboration will help organizations enhance their employees' productivity by leveraging the wealth of information available on Stack Overflow.
news.headline: Moveworks partners with Stack Overflow to add agents to AI Marketplace, providing users access to Stack Overflow knowledge.

news.summary: In 2024, the life sciences innovation ecosystem in Research Triangle Park, N.C., saw significant growth and advancements. The industry adapted to various challenges, including geopolitical, technological, and social uncertainties. A new report, "Global Trends in R&D 2025: Progress in Recapturing Innovation in Biopharma Innovation" by the IQVIA Institute for Human Data, highlighted improvements in funding, trial starts, program productivity, and cycle times. These developments signify promising progress within the sector as it navigates a complex landscape.
news.headline: Biopharma R&D metrics show stability and improvement in 2024, with funding, trial starts, productivity, and cycle times on the rise, says IQVIA report.

news.summary: Beijing - GigaDevice, a prominent semiconductor company known for its Flash Memory, 32-bit Microcontrollers (MCUs), Sensors, and Analog products, has introduced the GD5F1GM9 high-speed QSPI NAND Flash. This new product boasts record-breaking read speeds and incorporates cutting-edge Bad Block Management (BBM) technology. The GD5F1GM9 series combines the rapid read capabilities of NOR Flash with the extensive storage capacity and cost efficiency of NAND Flash. These advancements aim to tackle essential challenges in the semiconductor industry.
news.headline: GigaDevice introduces high-speed QSPI NAND Flash GD5F1GM9 series with breakthrough read speeds and BBM functionality.

news.summary: EquityProtect has formed partnerships with title companies in Reno, Nevada to offer property owners additional protection to supplement their current title insurance.
news.headline: EquityProtect teams up with title companies nationwide to boost property fraud prevention and strengthen safeguards for owners.

news.summary: In New York, SteelDome and Supermicro are teaming up to offer advanced virtualization and storage solutions tailored for hyperconverged and AI tasks. This joint effort aims to provide businesses and edge data centers with an efficient platform designed for quick integration into current systems, enabling swift deployment and instant operational efficiency. Leveraging Supermicro's cutting-edge hardware, the collaboration ensures a seamless transition for enterprises into optimized environments.
news.headline: SteelDome & Supermicro join forces for AI-powered, hyperconverged infrastructure, promising rapid deployment and productivity.

news.summary: Kore.ai, a prominent enterprise AI company in the United States, has revealed a new partnership with Inception, a prominent company under G42, well-known for its AI-driven products and enterprise solutions. This collaboration aims to collectively create AI-powered products for various enterprise sectors. By combining Inception's extensive experience in AI product development and robust research and development background with Kore.ai's expertise, the partnership intends to innovate and deliver cutting-edge solutions.
news.headline: Kore.ai partners with Inception to accelerate AI adoption, developing products in key sectors. Collaboration leverages Inception's AI expertise.

news.summary: OutSystems, a renowned company in the field of software innovation, has revealed plans for the ONE Conference 2025. This event aims to revolutionize generative software development and highlight the potential of Agentic AI. Set to occur on September 30 - October 1 in Lisbon at Feira Internacional de Lisboa - FIL, the conference offers a unique chance for the OutSystems community worldwide to engage with industry experts.
news.headline: OutSystems unveils ONE Conference 2025: Future of AI-powered app development. Event on Sept 30 - Oct 1 in Lisbon.

news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, Surescripts Health Information Network LLC, a subsidiary of Surescripts, has been recognized as a Qualified Health Information Network (QHIN) by The Sequoia Project, Inc., a Recognized Coordinating Entity. This designation allows Surescripts Health Information Network to facilitate nationwide health data exchange under the Trusted Exchange Framework and Common Agreement (TEFCA) guidelines. By joining other designated QHINs, Surescripts Health Information Network gains access to a network governed by TEFCA policies and technical standards.
news.headline: Surescripts Health Info Network now a Qualified Health Info Network as per The Sequoia Project, allowing nationwide data exchange.

news.summary: In Montréal today, EVLO Energy Storage Inc. revealed the successful commissioning of an energy storage system in American Samoa comprising 4 megawatts (MW) and 8 megawatt-hours (MWh) with a 2-hour duration. This milestone marks the completion of the initial project out of three in the region. EVLO, a subsidiary of Hydro-Québec, collaborated with Eastern Power Solutions (EPS), a solar energy service provider, for these solar-plus-storage projects. The initiatives aim to bolster the American Samoa Power Authority (ASPA).
news.headline: EVLO finishes 4MW, 8MWh energy storage project in American Samoa, first of three, in partnership with Eastern Power Solutions.

news.summary: Soluna Holdings, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SLNH, has confirmed the acquisition of two land parcels in Texas for Project Kati. This project, with a capacity of 166 MW, aims to support high-demand computing operations such as Bitcoin mining and possibly artificial intelligence. Soluna specializes in developing eco-friendly data centers catering to intensive computing needs. Today, they have finalized key agreements to move forward with the construction of Project Kati, bolstering their presence in the rapidly evolving tech sector.
news.headline: Soluna secures land for 166 MW Project Kati, Texas data center for Bitcoin mining and AI, listed on NASDAQ as $SLNH.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Moveworks, a top agentic AI assistant for enterprises, has teamed up with Highspot, the exclusive GTM enablement platform. This collaboration introduces an installable Highspot AI agent to Moveworks AI Agent Marketplace. The new agent empowers shared customers to boost sales efficiency through effortless content exploration and GTM asset management using their Moveworks AI Assistant. This offering is accessible through the Moveworks AI Agent Marketplace.
news.headline: Moveworks partners with Highspot to offer a Highspot AI agent for content discovery in the Moveworks AI Agent Marketplace.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Moveworks, a top agentic AI Assistant for enterprises, revealed at Moveworks.global an enhanced partnership with Snowflake, the AI Data Cloud company. This collaboration integrates Snowflake Cortex AI, Snowflake's suite of AI services, into the Moveworks AI Agent Marketplace as a pre-installed agent. Joint customers can now easily utilize Cortex AI through the Moveworks AI Assistant, providing enterprises with seamless access.
news.headline: Moveworks partners with Snowflake to offer Cortex AI in AI Agent Marketplace, providing data-driven insights to enterprises.

news.summary: NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) has been appointed as the Official Intelligent Data Infrastructure partner of the National Football League. This partnership aims at creating advanced, silo-free storage technology for the NFL to enhance data management and foster innovation. The collaboration signifies a joint effort between the NFL and NetApp to utilize intelligent data for developing innovative solutions. Renie Anderson, executive at the NFL, has highlighted the global partnership's focus on leveraging data for transformative initiatives within the league.
news.headline: NFL partners with NetApp as Official Intelligent Data Infrastructure Partner, focusing on innovative storage tech.

news.summary: WALTHAM, Massachusetts, April 15, 2025 – A renowned company in water and product quality solutions, Veralto Corporation (NYSE: VLTO), is set to broadcast its earnings conference call for the first quarter of 2025. The company, known for its commitment to ensuring the safety of critical resources worldwide, will provide insights into its financial performance during the upcoming webcast session.
news.headline: Veralto Corporation (NYSE: VLTO) to webcast Q1 2025 earnings call, safeguarding vital resources.

news.summary: Instylla, Inc., a privately held clinical-stage company focused on peripheral vascular embolization solutions, recently revealed the addition of Daniel Davis to its Board of Directors. Taking on the role of Chief Strategy Officer at Imperative, Mr. Davis brings a wealth of experience to the position. The news was shared on April 15, 2025 from Bedford, Massachusetts.
news.headline: Instylla appoints Daniel Davis to Board of Directors. Company specializes in vascular embolization solutions.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Lafayette Square revealed they are offering a credit facility to aid Maxwell Street Capital Partners in their investment in Port Jersey Logistics. Port Jersey is a prominent provider of integrated services. The specific amount of the credit facility was not disclosed, but this investment is expected to significantly boost Port Jersey's operations and growth. This move reflects Lafayette Square's commitment to supporting businesses like Maxwell Street and Port Jersey in expanding and thriving in their respective industries.
news.headline: Lafayette Square offers financing for Maxwell Street's investment in Port Jersey Logistics, a key provider in the industry.

news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, on April 15, 2025, Mobile Health, Inc., a prominent provider of corporate health and wellness solutions, unveiled its latest feature, the Employee Voice. This new tool is designed to assist employers in assessing and monitoring important factors that contribute to employee effectiveness. This initiative aims to enhance the employee experience and improve organizational outcomes.
news.headline: Mobile Health, Inc. introduces Employee Voice capability to boost productivity and engagement, from Palo Alto, with new features.

news.summary: Simpli.fi, a prominent Advertising Success Platform based in Fort Worth, Texas, specializing in programmatic advertising and workflow software for agencies, brands, and media companies, has received a nomination for the prestigious Dick Reed Awards, presented by Just Global. This recognition comes as a testament to Simpli.fi's industry leadership and innovation. The award ceremony is scheduled for April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Simpli.fi nominated for Dick Reed Awards by Just Global, a recognition in B2B marketing space.

news.summary: In Philadelphia on April 15, 2025, ActiveProtective® (APT) introduced the Tango® Belt, a new wearable medical device equipped with sensors that track motion and activate airbags in the event of severe hip-impacting falls. The belt has garnered attention for its innovative technology, with the ability to swiftly deploy airbags to prevent injuries.
news.headline: ActiveProtective receives FDA marketing authorization for Tango Belt, a wearable device to prevent hip fractures in older adults.

news.summary: In New York, notable figures such as Amina Mohammed, the Deputy Secretary-General of the United Nations; Sarah, Duchess of York; Bill Nye, the renowned Science Educator and Global Citizen Ambassador; José Manuel Barroso, a Professor and Chair of the Gavi Board; Ashlyn Harris, the Host of Wide Open Podcast, Creative Consultant, Entrepreneur & Retired Professional Athlete; James Blake, the Award-Winning Music Artist; Laverne Cox, the Emmy-nominated Actor, Producer, Advocate; and Seu Jorge, the Actor, Composer & Performer, recently became part of a prestigious group.
news.headline: Amina Mohammed, Sarah Duchess of York, Bill Nye, and more join Global Citizen Action Summit in NYC on April 30.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, CURRENC Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR), a leading fintech firm providing AI solutions to global financial institutions, revealed the appointment of Mr. Wan Lung Eng as their new Chief Financial Officer. Mr. Eng will assume his role starting April 16, 2025.
news.headline: CURRENC Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR) appoints Wan Lung Eng as CFO, effective April 16, 2025.

news.summary: Premion has introduced enhanced features and additional resources for advertisers to effectively manage and improve campaigns across various platforms.
news.headline: Premion expands capabilities, launches new tools for advertisers to optimize campaigns across channels, driving growth phase.

news.summary: Qorvo, a prominent global provider of connectivity and power solutions, based in Greensboro, North Carolina, has announced a conference call to discuss its financial performance for the fourth quarter of fiscal 2025. The call is scheduled for April 29, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. (ET). Interested individuals can tune in to the live webcast through the Investor Relations page on the company's website at https://ir.qorvo.com (found under “Events & Presentations”). Qorvo is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol QRVO.
news.headline: Qorvo will host a conference call on April 29, 2025, to review Q4 financial results at 4:30 pm (ET) live on their IR website.

news.summary: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, on April 15, 2025, Greystone Logistics reported its financial results for the three-month and nine-month periods ending on February 28, 2025. The company, known for producing recycled plastic pallets and offering eco-friendly logistics services, revealed a revenue of $14,315,798 for the quarter and $39,911,692 for the nine-month period. Additionally, their earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA) stood at $3,015,542 for the three-month period and $6,780,238 for the nine-month period.
news.headline: Greystone Logistics reports Q3 revenue of $14.3M, EBITDA of $3M; 9-month revenue $39.9M, EBITDA $6.8M. #GLGI #Earnings

news.summary: In Warrington, Pennsylvania, on April 15, 2025, Windtree Therapeutics, Inc. (stock symbol: WINT) disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. Windtree, a prominent biotechnology firm concentrating on the development of groundbreaking treatments for critical ailments, also shared important updates regarding its business operations.
news.headline: Windtree Therapeutics reported financial results for FY 2024 and key business updates, as a NASDAQ-listed biotech company.

news.summary: During Fiscal Year 2024, there was a decrease of $6.6 million in cash and cash equivalents, as opposed to a decline of $70.5 million in Fiscal Year 2023. This led to a significant reduction in cash consumption, marking a record low for Fiscal Year 2024.
news.headline: Rent the Runway, Inc. reports a decrease in cash equivalents with $6.6 million in fiscal year 2024, compared to $70.5 million in fiscal year 2023.

news.summary: In a joint announcement from Singapore and Montreal, Vertex Growth revealed a €10 million commitment to Dolphin Semiconductor. The investment is intended to bolster and expedite the company's growth strategy.
news.headline: Vertex Growth invests €10M in Dolphin Semiconductor to propel growth strategy in Singapore & Montreal.

news.summary: A cutting-edge platform called 6Storage 3.0 has been launched in St. Louis on April 15, 2025. This platform offers tiered pricing, tax automation, integration with QuickBooks Online, and a modern architecture tailored for real-world operators. The new version is a major update from its predecessor, providing enhanced capabilities for self-storage.
news.headline: 6Storage releases 6Storage 3.0 featuring tiered pricing, tax automation, QuickBooks Online integration, and modern architecture.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on April 15, 2025, System One, a top supplier of specialized outsourced services and workforce solutions, has named Scott Barnett as the new Chief Financial Officer. This appointment is effective immediately. Scott comes with over two years of experience in financial management and will now lead the financial operations of the company.
news.headline: System One appoints Scott Barnett as CFO. Specialized workforce solutions provider. Effective immediately.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 15, 2025, CoolIT Systems introduced the CHx2000, the most advanced row-based coolant distribution unit (CDU) globally, building on the success of the CHx1500 CDU. CoolIT Systems is renowned for its expertise in AI and high-performance computing liquid cooling technologies.
news.headline: CoolIT Systems introduces CHx2000, highest-performance row-based coolant distribution unit, following CHx1500 announcement.

news.summary: Basware has increased its executive team, focusing on enhancing their expertise in Invoice Lifecycle Management to navigate market trade tariffs. The company, based in Charlotte, N.C., announced this move on April 15, 2025. In light of ongoing global economic uncertainty, Goldman Sachs has predicted a 45% probability of a U.S. recession in the current year.
news.headline: CFOs face challenges with SAP S/4HANA migrations and trade tariffs; Basware expands leadership to address market challenges.

news.summary: A recent survey has revealed significant gaps in awareness of vascular disease, underscoring the importance of early intervention to prevent complications such as amputations and avoidable deaths. The Society for Vascular Surgery is calling on primary care providers to collaborate with vascular surgeons to improve patient outcomes and quality of care. This emphasizes the need for heightened vigilance, as early detection and treatment can mitigate risks. The survey findings emphasize the urgency of addressing these issues, as neglecting them could lead to serious consequences. It is crucial for healthcare professionals to prioritize vascular health and implement proactive measures to safeguard against severe outcomes.
news.headline: Survey shows lack of awareness about vascular disease, urges early intervention to prevent amputations and death among seniors. #PublicHealth

news.summary: The highly acclaimed coffee press in the world is introducing a new, extra-large brewer manufactured in the USA to cater to the requirements of both home brewers and café businesses. AeroPress, Inc. from Palo Alto, California, unveiled this new product on April 15, 2025. The company, known for its iconic coffee press that has garnered over 65,000 positive reviews, aims to provide a crystal-clear brewing experience with this latest innovation.
news.headline: AeroPress launches Clear XL, an extra-large, clear coffee brewer in the USA, catering to home brewers & cafes.

news.summary: A platform powered by artificial intelligence is now available to assist lenders of any scale in expediting loan closures, cutting costs, and maintaining compliance on-the-fly. Titled Friday Harbor, this innovative platform aids loan officers in swiftly compiling fully compliant loan packages in real time. Its launch was announced in Seattle on April 15, 2025.
news.headline: Friday Harbor raises $6M to boost community lender efficiency with AI, enabling faster closing and reduced costs.

news.summary: LyondellBasell, a major player in the chemical industry, unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report in Houston on April 15, 2025. The report highlights the company's strides in circular and low-carbon solutions, climate initiatives, and operational efficiency. As a global leader, LyondellBasell showcased substantial advancements in these areas.
news.headline: LyondellBasell shows progress in sustainability with 2024 report. Highlights: Circular solutions, low-carbon initiatives, operational excellence.

news.summary: A unique bladeless ceiling fan which is recognized as the most efficient HVAC delivery system globally, is enhanced with improved durability, performance, and advancements in lighting. Developed by Exhale Fans, this innovative product is supported by Purdue University and is the only one of its kind worldwide. The fan, based in Clarksville, Indiana, has been updated for longevity and improved functionality. This information was disclosed on April 15, 2025, from a press release.
news.headline: Exhale Fans launches Gen. 5, 10% energy savings, bladeless ceiling fan with Purdue backing._longevity and performance upgrades.

news.summary: A new platform, FintechVendors.com (FVC), has been introduced to the public in Orlando, Florida on April 15, 2025. This directory contains information on more than 4,400 fintech vendors and is available for free. Its primary aim is to simplify the vendor discovery process for financial services experts, potentially saving them valuable time.
news.headline: FintechVendors.com launches free directory with 4,400+ fintech providers to streamline vendor discovery for financial services professionals.

news.summary: Company X has announced that its earnings release and conference call are scheduled for May 7, 2025. During the call, company executives will discuss the financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. Shareholders, analysts, and other interested parties are invited to participate in the conference call to hear insights on Company X's performance. This event marks a crucial moment for the company as it discloses its profits and losses, providing transparency to stakeholders. The conference call serves as an opportunity for attendees to gain valuable information about the company's financial health. Save the date and make sure not to miss this important event on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: Sunrun schedules Q1 2025 earnings release and conference call on May 7, 2025.

news.summary: A lung health company experiencing significant growth is seeking to revolutionize early detection and precise treatment of lung cancer through the use of multi-modal artificial intelligence (AI). Based in Oxford, United Kingdom, and Houston, the company, Optellum, is at the forefront of utilizing AI for clinical decision support in early diagnosis. The date mentioned in the article is April 15, 2025, with Optellum being recognized as a global leader in this field.
news.headline: Optellum partners with Bristol Myers Squibb to enhance early lung cancer diagnosis with AI.(ai) (Source: PRNewswire)

news.summary: A collaboration between Paychex, a renowned HR and payroll services provider in the U.S., and Multiplier, a global employment platform, has been unveiled today. This partnership aims to aid American businesses in overcoming the increasing difficulties of finding skilled local talent. The goal is to support U.S. businesses in scaling efficiently.
news.headline: Paychex and Multiplier collaborate to assist U.S. businesses in scaling globally amidst talent shortages. Characters: 95

news.summary: RAPT Therapeutics, Inc., headquartered in South San Francisco, revealed the appointment of Jessica Savage, M.D., M.H.S., as the new Vice President of Clinical Development. This announcement was made on April 15, 2025. Dr. Savage will be responsible for managing the development of RPT904, a unique monoclonal antibody with an extended half-life. RPT904 is created to target free human immunoglobin E ("IgE"), a crucial factor in various allergic conditions. The focus of RAPT's development efforts for RPT904 will be primarily on food allergy and chronic spontaneous urticaria ("CSU"). The company is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol RAPT.
news.headline: RAPT Therapeutics appoints Dr. Jessica Savage as VP, Clinical Development for RPT904, designed for allergic diseases.

news.summary: Demand for Recruitment of a New CEO and Provision of Diverse Support Ocho Investments LLC, having a 5.2% stake in Digimarc Corporation (Nasdaq: DMRC), has advocated for hiring a new CEO. The company, based in Austin, Texas, released a presentation on April 15, 2025, detailing various forms of potential assistance and reiterated its ownership percentage in Digimarc.
news.headline: Ocho Investments calls for new CEO at Digimarc Corporation (DMRC), owns 5.2% stock, offers support.
Kuros Biosciences' AGM approves all resolutions, including financial report and Board member elections.

news.summary: In a recent announcement in Washington on April 15, 2025, Oracle revealed new capabilities that could significantly enhance the US Army's ability to modernize its operations. Through a firm-fixed price task order with the U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) Joint Warfighting Cloud Capability, Oracle is poised to support this initiative effectively. This development showcases the potential for cost-effective upgrades within the Army, reflecting an important step towards bolstering the nation's defense infrastructure.
news.headline: US Army Enterprise Cloud Management Agency expands Oracle Defense Cloud Services; aims to modernize operations. Firm-fixed price task order announced through DoD Joint Warfighting Cloud Capability.

news.summary: Fort Wayne, Indiana - On April 15, 2025, Franklin Electric Co., Inc. (NASDAQ: FELE) announced that it will disclose its first quarter financial results for 2025 at 8:00 am ET on Tuesday, April 29, 2025. Following this, at 9:00 am ET on the same day, a conference call will be held to discuss the earnings and provide updates on the company's operations. The first quarter earnings call for 2025 will be accessible through a live webcast, allowing participants to listen in. To join the webcast in a listen-only mode, visit the specified link.
news.headline: Franklin Electric (NASDAQ: FELE) to release Q1 2025 earnings on April 29 at 8:00 am ET with conference call at 9:00 am ET. Webcast available.

news.summary: Improving efficiency and durability with an upgraded system to enhance productivity among employees, NEW HARTFORD, N.Y., 15th April 2025 -- The demand for excellence in restaurants has reached unprecedented levels, necessitating advanced tools to support exceptional customer service. This upgrade aims to streamline operations and empower staff to work more intelligently, aiming to meet increased expectations.
news.headline: PAR Technology introduces PAR POS™ Spring Release to enhance restaurant operations with a faster system for staff efficiency and improved customer experience.
